headline: Robinhood: 'Buy' The Dip While Assets Keep Growing
summary: Robinhood stock is down 40% YTD, but strong trading volumes and margin growth plus a compressed 20x EBITDA valuation support a Buy rating. Learn more on HOOD.

headline: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) is a Trending Stock
summary: Robinhood Markets (HOOD) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

headline: Robinhood Expands Regulated Prediction Markets While Balancing Valuation And Risk
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) is rapidly expanding its prediction markets business while limiting high risk event contracts to address regulatory, legal, and reputational concerns. The company is working only with regulated U.S. platforms such as Kalshi and ForecastEx and is avoiding contracts that could be vulnerable to insider trading or manipulation. CEO Vlad Tenev has identified prediction markets as Robinhood’s fastest growing segment, pointing to a potentially meaningful new...

headline: Stocks to Watch: Goldman, Palantir, Exxon, Carnival
summary: ?Goldman Sachs (GS): The Wall Street bank will kick off first-quarter earnings season before the opening bell. Lenders are expected to report higher trading revenues driven by war-induced marked volatility.
